subcodes.first_line: O descendant of the glorious martyr! Praise be unto God that this blessed scion of the martyred one manifesteth the inner reality of his father [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل شهید مجید الحمد لله که آن نجل سعید شهید مظهر الولد سر ابیه است یعنی
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @martyrs and martyrdom
